violations.description: Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. A wet mop was stored in the mop bucket, and not in a position to dry, by the mop sink.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. The guides of the vegetable slicer in the back by the sink still had food debris after cleaning.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee coat and bag was hung on the storage racks for the storage of clean equipment and utensils.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
